title: Business Analyst (IT System)
description:
Key Responsibilities:

• Collaborate with stakeholders to gather requirements, understand and document business needs, business requirements and flows related to the Authority’s public services and application systems;

• Review business rules and service journeys, gathering requirement specifications, engaging stakeholders, creating user journey maps and wireframes, and providing support on updates to the Authority;

• Develop user stories, specifications, acceptance criteria, and create detailed process maps to visualise, understand and streamline current workflows and business processes;

• Review design specifications and project deliverables (e.g. monthly project report, log review for privileged user access, test plan, test reports, application design/ code) to ensure the completeness for the Authority’s acceptance;

• Understand and review source codes from vendor(s) for deployment;

• Support and review on-site acceptance and System Integration Testing (SIT);

• Facilitate and support User Acceptance Test (UAT) and trainings for users;

• Conduct technical review and assessment of End of Support (EOS) upgrade proposals before making recommendations to the Authority;

• Coordinate, facilitate and support any audit to be conducted by the Authority’s appointed auditor(s) on the system;

• Project management and governance, ensuring performance and fulfilment of contractual obligations by the Authority’s appointed contractor managing the collection system.

• Provide maintenance and technical operations support for the Authority’s

• Reviewing impact analysis of all system modifications or new requirements on the functionality, performance, and security of the systems

• Work closely with external parties, ICT providers or government agencies for the operational and maintenance works and new initiatives/enhancements of the Authority’s systems;

• Performing hands-on development as part of exploration of new technologies/products and automation of existing processes;

• Participate and support in incident, troubleshooting, testing and verification of reported issues, incidents and to follow up with the Authority’s appointed contractors, stakeholders and business users to ensure timely escalation where required and completion and closure of the issues or incident; and

• Ensure that the deliveries of the project by the Authority’s appointed contractors are compliant with relevant policies and guidelines and to identify and close any compliance gaps.

Requirements:

• At least 3 years of experience in business analysis.

• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information/ Infocom Technology, or related discipline would be preferred;

• Strong knowledge in application support and maintenance and possesses hands-on’ knowledge and experience in end-to-end Software Development Life Cycle;

• Experience in IT project implementation, specifically on user requirements gathering, IT business analysis, application solutioning, UI/UX design and using automated testing software such as Tricentis TOSCA would be an added advantage;

• Experience in the following would be advantageous:

• Cloud platform and technology;

• Application development using Power builder, Java, Delphi or ASP.Net; and

• Government projects.

• Experience with stakeholder management;

• Have a positive attitude and good interpersonal skills, able to work and communicate effectively with stakeholders to ensure business needs are met; and

• Experience in working under minimal supervision and to demonstrate ability to ensure tasks are well completed and project is on schedule.

skills.skill: User Interface and User Experience Optimisation

postedCompany.description:
INNOVATIQ TECHNOLOGIES PTE. LTD:

We are Singapore Head Quartered multinational company with offices in Singapore, Malaysia and India. Planning to expand to other South East Asia and US. We are Client business focused technology and consultancy services company which focuses mainly in on the below business towers:

1. Digital Transformation

2. Cloud enablement & migration

3. Cyber Security

4. Consultancy Services

1. Digital Transformation:

We provide end to end Digital Transformation through application development, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Internet of things to customers who want to keep pace with changing trends to achieve competitive edge of new generation business models. Even in this fast-moving 5G internet world we found some of the companies are stuck with their old practices of using excel and legacy applications to run their business. These legacy applications are still useful but require huge costs to enhance and maintain due to lack of support from the vendors. For such companies, we offer our consultancy services to implement and migrate to a new out-of-the-box products that provides more powerful features and support their business with productive way of working and reducing their operational cost.

Digital transformation is the integration of digital technology into all areas of a business, fundamentally changing how you operate and deliver value to customers. It's also a cultural change that requires organizations to continually challenge the status quo, experiment, and get comfortable with failure. We provide Digital Transformation to Mid-Market and Enterprise Customers vis App Dev, AI, ML, RPA and IoT.

ERP Rollout for midmarket & Enterprise clients:

ERP provides complete visibility into core business processes and optimizes systems through superior resource tracking and reporting, database management and data sharing and overall improved information systems. ERP systems can allow your business to expand without the addition of IT or staffing costs. We implement & support SAP S4 HANA, MS Dynamics.

2. Cloud Enablement & Migration

Our cloud service offerings include end to end consultancy and implementation as per needs of our customer business requirement. We are partner agnostic company and work with multiple cloud players of the market. Our employees are cloud certified with AWS, Azure and IBM. We offer our consultancy services to those clients who are looking to bring down their capex and move their workloads to open platforms that can help them to operate with minimal cost and faster response.

We support the most open and secure public cloud for businesses and suggest a next-generation hybrid multi cloud platforms, advanced data and AI capabilities, and deep enterprise expertise across various Industries.
